mapper.sql: select road_name, start_point, end_point, lane_type, length_km, direction, time_limit, longitude, latitude from dim_bus_lanes
mapper.select: SELECT road_name as roadName, start_point as startPoint, end_point as endPoint, lane_type as laneType, length_km as lengthKm, direction, time_limit as timeLimit, longitude, latitude FROM dim_bus_lanes ORDER BY road_name
SELECT lane_type as laneType, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(length_km) as totalLengthKm, AVG(length_km) as avgLengthKm FROM dim_bus_lanes GROUP BY lane_type ORDER BY totalLengthKm DESC

SELECT l.line_name as lineName, COUNT(DISTINCT b.road_name) as busLaneCount, SUM(b.length_km) as totalBusLaneLength, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT b.road_name) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.stop_name) FROM dim_route_station_details r WHERE r.line_name = l.line_name), 0) * 100 as coverageRate FROM dim_lines l LEFT JOIN dim_route_station_details r ON l.line_name = r.line_name LEFT JOIN dim_bus_lanes b ON ST_Distance_Sphere( point(r.longitude, r.latitude), point(b.longitude, b.latitude) ) <= 500 WHERE l.line_name = #{lineName} GROUP BY l.line_name

SELECT road_name as roadName, start_point as startPoint, end_point as endPoint, lane_type as laneType, length_km as lengthKm, direction, time_limit as timeLimit, longitude, latitude, CASE lane_type WHEN '主干道' THEN '#FF0000' WHEN '次干道' THEN '#FFA500' WHEN '支路' THEN '#FFFF00' ELSE '#00FF00' END as color FROM dim_bus_lanes WHERE longitude IS NOT NULL AND latitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY road_name
